figures.caption: Figure 1: Overview of ARAM. ARAM mitigates knowledge conflict via step-wise and token-wise adaptive guidance driven by the Signal-to-Noise Ratio.
Table 1: Performance comparison across QA benchmarks. Bold indicates the best score within each backbone.

Figure 3: Dynamics of adaptive guidance. (a) Average guidance scale (λt) per step. ARAM maintains high guidance for gold documents but suppresses λt for noisy ones. (b) Token-wise guidance heatmap. Black squares mark unmasking positions, demonstrating a right-to-left generation tendency. ARAM assigns larger guidance to positions that align with the unmasking pattern.
Figure 5: Prompt template used for LLaDA.
Figure 6: Few-shot prompt template used for the Dream and other AR backbones.
Figure 4: Prompt template for LLM-based retrieval context quality annotation.
